mba_work_experience_norm: MBA cohorts generally expect several years; deferred MBA permits final-year application then work
admissions_tests: GRE/GMAT varies; many specialist programs optional
student_work_rights: F-1 on-campus generally up to 20 hours/week in session; CPT/OPT rules apply
post_study_work: Usually 12-month post-completion OPT; qualifying STEM degree may add 24-month extension
employer_sponsorship: H-1B or other employer route after OPT; selection and policy risk
permanent_residence_outlook: Possible but employer/visa dependent; not a study-to-PR promise
scholarship_depth: Strong at elite institutions but highly competitive
major_risks: Very high total cost; STEM designation must be verified; sponsorship uncertainty
recommendation: Dream only with major aid or confirmed funding; prefer specialist STEM master's over immediate MBA

mba_work_experience_norm: Top MBAs generally value 3+ years; specialist MSc welcomes fresh graduates
student_work_rights: Student permission commonly allows limited term-time work; verify visa conditions
post_study_work: 18 months for non-doctoral Graduate applications on/after 2027-01-01 under current rules
employer_sponsorship: Skilled Worker requires eligible sponsored job after Graduate route
permanent_residence_outlook: Possible through qualifying work routes; not automatic
major_risks: High cost; Graduate route shortened for 2027 onward; housing
recommendation: Strong target only with scholarship/cost control; one-year format reduces time to recruit

best_fresh_grad_path: Master's in Management Analytics; tech/business master's
mba_work_experience_norm: MBA usually expects work; specialist master's fits fresh graduates
student_work_rights: Eligible students may work under study-permit conditions; current limits must be rechecked
post_study_work: Eligible master's of at least 8 months may receive 3-year PGWP under current rules; verify DLI/program
employer_sponsorship: Employer permit not normally needed during valid open PGWP; later route varies
permanent_residence_outlook: Multiple economic pathways but criteria/quotas change
tech_business_job_market: Strong tech/analytics hubs; softer market cycles possible
scholarship_depth: University awards; fewer full awards for coursework master's
major_risks: PGWP/DLI eligibility changes; high housing cost; immigration policy volatility
recommendation: Selective target; verify public DLI and PGWP eligibility before deposit

best_fresh_grad_path: Management and Technology; Information Systems; Innovation; data/analytics
mba_work_experience_norm: MBA usually later; MSc commonly fresh-graduate friendly with strict subject-credit prerequisites
indicative_tuition_2026_snapshot: Public programs often no/low tuition; exceptions include TUM EUR 4k/semester for listed program and Baden-Wurttemberg fees
teaching_language: Many English master's; German valuable for jobs
admissions_tests: GRE/GMAT uncommon but program-specific; aptitude assessment common
student_work_rights: International students may work within statutory limits; verify current permit wording
post_study_work: Up to 18 months after German degree to seek qualified employment; any job permitted during search under current rules
employer_sponsorship: Qualified employment/Blue Card routes after job offer
permanent_residence_outlook: Relatively structured for qualifying skilled workers; German improves outcomes
tech_business_job_market: Strong industrial tech/SaaS/consulting; German language matters
scholarship_depth: DAAD and university awards; tuition savings often larger than scholarship
major_risks: Rigid prerequisite matching; language; housing; some states/universities charge tuition
recommendation: Priority financial hedge; include at least two prerequisite-matched public options

best_fresh_grad_path: MiM; Innovation Management; Entrepreneurship; Business Analytics
mba_work_experience_norm: MiM/MSc fits fresh graduates; MBA normally later
indicative_tuition_2026_snapshot: Public national degrees can be low; grandes ecoles often EUR 20k-60k+; unstable
teaching_language: Many English programs; French essential for broader jobs
student_work_rights: Student residence holders may work within legal annual limit; verify current conditions
post_study_work: Eligible French master's graduates may receive 1-year job-search/company-creation permit
employer_sponsorship: Transition possible with qualifying study-related job/remuneration or entrepreneurship route
permanent_residence_outlook: Possible through qualifying residence/work; not automatic
tech_business_job_market: Excellent luxury/consulting/tech/startup ecosystem; French is key
startup_ecosystem: Very strong Paris; growing regional hubs
major_risks: French language; school cost; employment salary/degree relation conditions
recommendation: Strong target if Deepan commits to B1/B2 French and scholarship applications

best_fresh_grad_path: Business Information Management; Innovation Management; Business Analytics
mba_work_experience_norm: MSc generally fresh-graduate friendly but academic-credit matching is strict
teaching_language: English widely available; Dutch helps jobs
student_work_rights: Non-EEA work is regulated and employer permit conditions apply during study
post_study_work: 1-year orientation-year permit; free to work during that year
employer_sponsorship: Highly skilled migrant route after qualifying job; reduced salary criterion may apply during window
permanent_residence_outlook: Possible through skilled work; not automatic
tech_business_job_market: Strong digital, logistics, fintech and sustainability market
scholarship_depth: NL Scholarship and institution awards; mostly partial
major_risks: Housing shortage; non-EEA tuition; capped programs close early
recommendation: Priority balanced target; apply early and solve housing conservatively

best_fresh_grad_path: Business Analytics; Digital Innovation; Information Systems
mba_work_experience_norm: Specialist MSc fits fresh graduates; MBA expects experience
indicative_tuition_2026_snapshot: EUR 18k-30k commonly for non-EU business master's; unstable
admissions_tests: GRE/GMAT uncommon for many MSc; program-specific
student_work_rights: Stamp 2 conditions permit limited work; verify current hours and dates
post_study_work: Level 9+ graduates may receive up to 24 months under Third Level Graduate Programme, subject to renewal conditions
employer_sponsorship: Employment permit needed after graduate permission; Critical Skills route valuable
permanent_residence_outlook: Possible through qualifying employment; not automatic
tech_business_job_market: Strong multinational tech, analytics and operations base
scholarship_depth: GOI-IES can provide full fee waiver plus EUR 10k; university awards
major_risks: Housing; small market; high living cost; permit eligibility
recommendation: Priority English-speaking target; pair one Dublin option with lower-cost Galway/UCD analysis

mba_work_experience_norm: Specialist master's accepts fresh graduates; MBA usually expects experience
admissions_tests: GMAT/GRE varies; many MSc do not require
english_test: IELTS/TOEFL/PTE accepted subject to program/visa rules
student_work_rights: Student visa work cap applies; verify current hours
post_study_work: Indian nationals: master's coursework/extended/research currently up to 3 years under AI-ECTA settings; eligibility rules apply
permanent_residence_outlook: Points and occupation rules change; no guarantee
tech_business_job_market: Strong analytics/product market in major cities
scholarship_depth: Australia Awards/program awards; full coursework funding limited
major_risks: Very high cost; visa age/rule changes; occupation-market cycles
recommendation: Secondary target only with major scholarship or strong family funding

mba_work_experience_norm: Specialist master's can fit fresh graduates; MBA typically expects experience
student_work_rights: At listed institutions, eligible Student's Pass holders can work up to 16 hours/week in term or qualifying internship
post_study_work: No automatic general post-study work route; Student's Pass expiry requires a work pass to work
employer_sponsorship: Employer applies for Employment Pass/S Pass; salary and COMPASS criteria apply
tech_business_job_market: Excellent regional HQ, fintech, analytics and product market
major_risks: No automatic stay-back; high fees/living; work-pass thresholds
recommendation: Dream/strong target only for NUS-level fit plus aid and clear employment case

mba_work_experience_norm: Specialist master's may accept fresh graduates; MBA often prefers experience
student_work_rights: Work requires authorization under applicable student/employment rules; institution guidance controls
post_study_work: No universal automatic graduate work visa; residence generally needs employer/sponsor; Golden Visa only for qualifying exceptional cases
permanent_residence_outlook: Long-term residence possible for qualifying categories; not automatic
tech_business_job_market: Strong regional business, logistics, fintech and AI investment
scholarship_depth: University merit awards; government-linked opportunities vary
major_risks: Employer-linked status; high cost; narrower permanent-settlement model
recommendation: Backup for regional career strategy only with scholarship and accredited program
